violations.text: The rolling door to the outside, located in the loading dock area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 12/10/2024
The faucet of the hand wash sink in the men's restroom in the retail area was in poor repair (active leak observed). New Violation. Correct By: 12/31/2024
The ceiling tiles in the mop sink and retail areas of the establishment were in poor repair (water damage observed). New Violation. Correct By: 02/28/2025
